summary: Iteration 146: Modification Email Deduplication Bug Fix - All tests PASSED (21/21 backend, 100% frontend). Verified that legacy email functions (_send_proposal_emails, _send_acceptance_emails) are REMOVED from modification_routes.py. Only 'modification_proposed' and 'modification_applied' email types are used (via modification_service.py). Notification idempotence verified. Frontend navbar badges and Decisions page working correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: modification_routes.py: CLEAN - No legacy email functions (_send_proposal_emails, _send_acceptance_emails) present
modification_routes.py: Only contains _build_changes_html helper for test compatibility (lines 320-361)
modification_service.py: _notify_modification_proposed() creates in-app notification + email for all pending voters (lines 934-1015)
modification_service.py: _notify_modification_applied() creates in-app notification for all engaged participants (lines 1018-1070)
modification_service.py: _send_modification_emails() sends 'modification_applied' emails after proposal is applied (lines 529-631)

notification_service.py: was_email_sent() and mark_email_sent() provide email idempotency guards
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Star Auto appointment (270f4c8a-1ef5-4d32-9d4c-c405155f7539)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email deduplication bug fix verified. Legacy email functions (_send_proposal_emails, _send_acceptance_emails) have been REMOVED from modification_routes.py. Only email types 'modification_proposed' and 'modification_applied' are used (via modification_service.py). The notification system is idempotent on (user_id, event_type, reference_id). Scheduler jobs (proposal_expiration_job every 5min, modification_vote_reminder_job every 15min) are registered. Frontend navbar badges and Decisions page working correctly.

bug_fix_verification.issue: Duplicate emails sent when creating modification proposals
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Two email systems coexisted: legacy route-level (modification_routes.py) and new service-level (modification_service.py)
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Legacy functions _send_proposal_emails() and _send_acceptance_emails() REMOVED from modification_routes.py
